summary: Thirteen military armored vehicles were assessed, all confirmed with NO DAMAGE, showing intact hulls and tracks while moving and kicking up dust. The full scene depicts a column of these vehicles advancing across a dry, dusty terrain under a partly cloudy sky, generating significant dust clouds. The consistent operational status of all assessed targets suggests the formation is functioning as intended with no observed combat damage or mechanical failure.
